overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player moves from under a highway overpass, across neon-lit intersections with futuristic traffic, and into a covered market area with hanging red lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under a concrete overpass, passing a parked green sports car

entered.detail: futuristic green and yellow sports car parked on the side of the road
large concrete highway overpass creating a covered tunnel effect
illuminated advertising screen mounted high on a building
tall street light pole with bright overhead illumination
black metal pedestrian safety railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete highway overpass at night during heavy rain. The camera moves forward along a wet sidewalk, passing a distinctive green sports car parked on the right. Neon lights and digital billboards illuminate the scene with blue and red reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with futuristic architecture

events.description: exits the covered overpass into an open intersection with tall buildings
futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection with glowing tail lights

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the futuristic traffic and architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection with red neon tail lights

entered.detail: curved modern glass building with illuminated windows and neon accents
elevated highway structure spanning across the intersection overhead
marked pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
suspended traffic signals showing red lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a curved glass skyscraper on the right. The camera crosses the wet asphalt crosswalk as futuristic vehicles with glowing red tail lights drive through. The elevated highway continues overhead while the concrete overpass recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching food market district

events.description: FOODSCAPE neon sign becomes visible in the distance marking the market entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial street toward the illuminated market entrance

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading FOODSCAPE above a market entrance
low-rise commercial structures with illuminated storefronts

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a commercial street with the red neon FOODSCAPE sign visible ahead. The glass skyscraper falls behind as the scene transitions toward a market district. The elevated highway remains visible to the left while street-level shops line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food market entrance with hanging decorations

events.description: enters the covered FOODSCAPE market area with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered market entrance, passing other pedestrians browsing stalls

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead into the market alleyway

entered.detail: archway entrance structure with the FOODSCAPE sign overhead
traditional red paper lanterns hanging in strings overhead
wooden market stalls with goods displayed under awnings
illuminated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the FOODSCAPE market through an archway adorned with hanging red paper lanterns. The environment becomes semi-covered and more intimate, with market stalls visible on the right and other pedestrians walking ahead. The wet pavement gives way to tiled flooring as the rain protection begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered market alley with vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow market alleyway past various stalls and vendors

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward the camera in the narrow alley

entered.detail: confined walkway between tall buildings with overhead coverings
weathered building walls with windows and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the narrow covered alleyway of the market. Red lanterns hang overhead between the buildings, creating a canopy effect. The space is more enclosed and intimate, with residential building facades visible and pedestrians walking in both directions through the dimly lit passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked industrial underpass into the intimate, lantern-lit corridors of a futuristic market. It begins beneath a concrete highway overpass, moving past a green sports car as blue and red neon reflections shimmer on the wet sidewalk. As the camera emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where futuristic vehicles glide past a curved glass skyscraper under the looming elevated highway. The view then shifts toward a commercial street, passing the glowing red FOODSCAPE sign as the open city architecture gives way to the entrance of a market district. Finally, the camera passes through an archway of hanging red paper lanterns, transitioning from the rainy asphalt to tiled flooring as it moves deeper into a narrow, enclosed alleyway lined with residential facades and pedestrians.
